children.text: If you shake your phone, CoverMe will immediately lock and disguise as an ordinary album.
CoverMe assigns you a private phone number.
It is anonymous and off the records.
It has no connection to your cell phone number.
It is a real mobile phone number!
Get a private phone number and start sending private text messages.
Those advanced functions can further protect your privacy. We can proudly assure you those features are never available in other messaging apps.
"You got a new message"- This is the notification every messaging app shows you. CoverMe allows you to personalize it!
Disguise CoverMe as an actual reader. No one will know you are on CoverMe!
The login screen looks like an album. When you are on CoverMe, shake and lock!
Block unwanted calls. Automatically answer your calls with voicemail.

Calling and texting between CoverMe users is secure and free. 
You can even edit, recall, or send self-destruct messages.
This CoverMe account has been deactivated.
You logged in to CoverMe on a new device. You can no longer access CoverMe on this device.
If you suspect someone logged into your CoverMe account on a new device, please immediately change your master password and reactivate CoverMe on this device.
You can also change your master password immediately after you reactivate CoverMe on this device.
Searching for friends in your contacts who are also using CoverMe.
Add CoverMe friends for free texting & calling.
Get a CoverMe private phone number for secure calling & secure texting.
If you shake your phone, CoverMe will immediately lock and disguise as an ordinary album.
